resources.string: Plug the XREAL Air 2 Ultra into the USB-C port…
Grant camera & microphone access — Android requires them to open a USB device that contains a camera and mics.
Camera/microphone permission denied — Android will not grant USB access to the glasses without them (Settings → Apps → XREAL Stereo Cam → Permissions).
USB permission denied — replug or restart the app.
Could not open the USB device.
Streaming — waiting for the first stereo pair…
XREAL Air 2 Ultra L | R ctr=%1$d %2$.0f fps [%3$s]
Could not create the snapshot file.
